O3 O3_INJECTIONS 37(O3)Injections CHAR 1 A determination of the number of days during the past seven days that the patient received any type of medication, antigen, vaccines (including influenza and pneumovax), and/or PPD tests, by subcutaneous, intramuscular or intradermal injection. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
133 P1AA P1AA_CHEMO 38aa(P1aa)Special Care - Chemotherapy CHAR 1 Indicates the patient received any type of chemotherapy given by any route. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1
